subcodes.first_line: Thou desirest the power to teach; this desire is the ultimate aspiration of the sincere ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آرزوی قوّهء تبلیغ مینمائی این آرزو نهایت آمال مخلصین است البته انسان کامل
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @disregarding own capacity in teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
